problem id: 31966698
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHR(6)

examples:
  01001010 -> 11111110
  10011111 -> 11011011
  00010101 -> 11111011
  11101100 -> 11001111
  00001011 -> 11111111
  11110101 -> 11101001
  11101001 -> 11011110
  10100111 -> 11110101
  00101000 -> 11111111
  10000100 -> 11111101

query: 00100011
predicted answer: 11110111
